narrative: Easily test the karat content of gold with ToolTreaux’s 10k Gold Testing Kit with Gold Testing Stone! The kit includes two, 0.5oz bottles and one gold testing stone. The included testing solutions are potent, effective and will see you through hundreds of tests! Housed in small, sturdy, shatterproof plastic squeeze bottles, the 10k gold testing solution bottles are easy to maneuver, giving the tester control over the amount of solution escaping the bottle. GOLD TESTING KIT METHOD: This gold testing method is best used on gold that is yet to be smelted, due to the harsh nature of the solution, that could potentially damage an already finished item; if testing fine jewelry or other finished gold items, be sure to choose an inconspicuous spot, so as not to compromise the finished piece. HOW THE GOLD TESTING KIT WORKS: To test gold karat content and purity, scratch the item onto the test stone leaving a visible deposit, then place a small drop of the solution over top of deposit; if the gold is the same karat or higher, the solution will not affect the deposit; if the deposit is of a lower karat, the deposit will dissolve and eventually disappear; ensure gold testing stone has been thoroughly washed before completing any testing! PLEASE NOTE: Testing Solutions can be harmful to the skin. Please exercise the utmost caution when opening and using this product and method of testing! Proper protective eye wear and gloves are highly recommended, as the solution can burn unprotected skin. Read the label on the bottle and follow provided operational instructions.

short_description: The ASR Outdoor Gold Panning Classifier Screens are a must-have for gold prospecting and mineral recovery. The Gold Rush Classifier Sifting Set from ASR Outdoor will aid your efforts by sorting your raw material.
narrative: The ASR Outdoor Gold Panning Classifier Screens are a must-have for gold prospecting and mineral recovery. Utilizing our high-impact steel wire classifier sieves is one of the first steps in successful gold prospecting by reducing down your material into a manageable size. The Gold Rush Classifier Sifting Set from ASR Outdoor will aid your efforts by sorting your raw material. Available in 9 different sizes for both fine and coarse material sifting, ensuring you'll be able to properly sift all size material. These sifting classifier screens are made of tough, high-impact plastic and 304 stainless steel wire mesh with a reinforced high side wall. Each screen will fit over a standard 5 gallon bucket as well as a 14" gold pan and they are stackable, interlocking into each other to ensure that they will not slip or slide when used in conjunction with one another. Proper classification of material by size is the key to more efficient gold separation. This is true for roughing out your material, all the way to the final step of fine gold separation. Using a sieve works for panning, sluicing and high banking equally well. Screening or classifying material into groups based on size will ensure that any gold, whether nuggets or flakes, will not get lost. Separating and processing your gold concentrates by size with a classifier makes gold recovery much more efficient and less labor intensive, is faster and a more effective way to sort speeding up the panning process, resulting in more gold

narrative: This particle screen is made of tough, high-impact plastic and 0.1mm stainless steel wire. The design is made to fit easily into a 5 gallon bucket and it matches the size of our 14" gold pans to allow easy transfer of materials from one to the other. Although gold is heavy, small flakes will not be able to displace larger rocks from your initial sample. Screening or "classifying" material into groups based on size will ensure that any gold, whether nuggets or flakes, will not get lost. In addition, looking through similar sized materials is a faster and more effective way to sort and will speed up the panning process, resulting in more gold! This 1/2" mesh size is perfect for removing larger rocks and gravel from your mineral sample.

narrative: Are you sick of pesky flies and other insects in your house? Then you need a set of PIC Fly Traps. Our fly traps are an effective way to control common horse flies, houseflies, moths, and other insects both indoors and out. These traps can be used in any room of your house, including food preparation areas as well as outdoors. The modular design increases the surface area of the trap, allowing a greater ability to trap flying insects. The PIC fly traps are super easy to use. Just remove them from the box, carefully remove the protective paper and suspend using the attached plastic hook. Please be careful to not touch the sticky coating by handling the top and the bottom. For the best results, we suggest that you hang the traps vertically with all sides of the trap exposed, near the center of the area in which you wish to control insects. To discard, wrap the used trap securely in newspaper, paper, or a plastic bag. PIC fly traps will become even more effective after the first few flies are caught. Since flies are sensitive to temperature, light, and humidity, these traps work great close to windows. Replace the traps every 3 months for the best results.
